info.english_meaning: to torment to distress to hurt to suffer to misbehave
info.hindI_arTa: kleSa yA duHKa denA harakata karanA duHKa sahana karanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: evamArADyamAnopi kliSnAti Buvanatrayam ' (kumAra. 2.40) ityAdiprayogadarSanAt sakarmakatvamapi asya iti jYAyate  ' vyaktoktO kleSate kleSeH kliSnAti tu vibADane  divAderupatAperTe taNi syAt kliSyate padam ' (Slo. 163 - 164) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'api cApipariklizwaM cirAd dArEH samAgatam AtmakAryagarIyastvAd vaktuM necCAmi vAnaram' (rA0 42861) apiparyorekataraH SakyaH parihartum anyatareRa vivakzitArTasya samarpaRAt
'gurutA hfdayotkleSaH sadanaM CardyarocakO' (suSruta0 uttara0 3937) hfdayotkleSo hfdgatA tIvravedanA
'snehasvedEstaTotkleSya vapuzaH SoDanErmalaH' (azwANga0 sUtra0 1859) utkleSya patanonmuKaM kftvA
'parikliSyamAne ca' (pA0 3455) parikleSaH sarvato bADanam iti kASikA uraH pratipezaM yuDyanta ityudAharaRam kftsnamuraH pIqayanto yuDyanta iti tadarTaH
